chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 924 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 07.12.2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents No.3 & 4. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents No.3 & 4 has filed a statement stating that petitioner has already received pension difference amount of Rs.2,00,000/- vide cheque No.40095450 dated 23.06.2023 and an amount of Rs.1,42,432/- vide cheque No.40095527 dated 31.08.2023. He further undertakes that outstanding amount, if any, would be paid to her accordingly within a period of two months. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
